q: I have a mild headache after a stressful day and poor sleep. No severe symptoms. What are common causes and what should I watch for?
I have a mild fever and sore throat since yesterday. I can drink fluids and breathe normally. What are common next steps?
I have worsening abdominal pain and nausea since this morning. It is getting harder to ignore. What should I do next?
I keep feeling dizzy and almost fainted once when I stood up today. What should I do?
I have chest pressure with sweating and shortness of breath right now. Should I be worried?
My dad suddenly has slurred speech and one side of his face is drooping. What should I do?
